narrative:
Burlington Township (precinct in Licking County) has 937 registered voters, with 47.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 39.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 26.3 percentage points.
